privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
privacy.introAlert: This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your information when you visit our websites, use our applications, or engage with us as a job applicant, employee, or client.
privacy.s1P1: This Privacy Policy applies to all users of our websites, mobile applications, and related online services (collectively, the "Services"). It covers both job applicants and employees who use our platforms.
privacy.s1P2: This Policy does not apply to third-party websites or services that are linked from our platforms.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect information in three main ways:
privacy.s2L1: Information you provide directly: such as your name, contact details, resume, employment history, education, shift preferences, and other information submitted through forms or applications.
privacy.s2L2: Employment or assignment data: including job assignments, timesheets, location check-ins, payroll data, tax forms, and compliance documentation.
privacy.s2L3: Automatic data: such as device type, IP address, browser information, and usage analytics collected via cookies and similar technologies.
privacy.s2Sensitive: In some cases, we may collect sensitive information (e.g., Social Security number, driver's license, or work authorization documents) for employment verification or payroll purposes, handled under strict security and compliance controls.
privacy.s3L1: Process job applications and match you with potential opportunities
privacy.s3L2: Verify employment eligibility (e.g., I-9, E-Verify, background checks)
privacy.s3L3: Communicate about shifts, scheduling, payroll, and HR matters
privacy.s3L4: Provide, improve, and secure our Services
privacy.s3L5: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations
privacy.s3L6: Conduct analytics to improve platform performance and worker experience
privacy.s3P2: We do not sell personal information and only share data with vendors who help us deliver employment-related or operational functions.
privacy.s4L1: Clients and hiring partners to facilitate job placements or assignments.
privacy.s4L2: Service providers (e.g., payroll processors, background check partners, cloud hosting, and IT security vendors) who perform services on our behalf.
privacy.s4L3: Regulatory authorities as required by law or government request.
privacy.s4P2: All third-party vendors are bound by confidentiality and data protection obligations consistent with applicable law.
privacy.s5P1: We use cookies, pixels, and analytics tools to understand how users interact with our websites and apps, improve performance, and enhance usability.
privacy.s5P2: You can control or disable cookies through your browser settings, though some features of the site may not function properly without them.
privacy.s6Intro: Where applicable law requires a legal basis, we process your personal information based on:
privacy.s6L1: Your consent (for example, when you agree to receive SMS messages)
privacy.s6L2: Performance of a contract (e.g., your employment agreement)
privacy.s6L3: Compliance with legal obligations (e.g., tax, payroll, labor regulations)
privacy.s6L4: Legitimate interests (e.g., platform security, service improvement)
privacy.s7P1: We implement industry-standard security measures including encryption, access controls, and data minimization to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, or destruction.
privacy.s7P2: Access to sensitive data (such as SSNs) is restricted to authorized personnel and is stored in compliance with applicable data protection laws.
privacy.s8P1: We retain personal data only as long as necessary for employment, business, or legal purposes. Retention periods vary by data type and legal requirement (e.g., payroll records may be retained longer for compliance reasons).
privacy.s9Intro: Depending on your location, you may have rights to:
privacy.s9L1: Access, correct, or delete your personal information
privacy.s9L2: Request a copy of the information we hold about you
privacy.s9L3: Opt out of certain communications or data uses
privacy.s9L4: Not be discriminated against for exercising privacy rights
privacy.s9P2: To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s9P3: We may need to verify your identity before fulfilling your request.
privacy.s10P1: Our Services are not directed to children under 16. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors without appropriate consent.
privacy.s11P1: If you access our Services from outside the United States, be aware that your data may be processed and stored in the U.S., where data protection laws may differ from those in your jurisdiction.
privacy.s12P1: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. When we make material changes, we will post the updated version on this page and update the "Last Updated" date above. Continued use of our Services after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised Policy.
privacy.s13P1: For privacy questions, requests, or complaints, please contact:

consent.title: SMS and Mobile Communications Consent Agreement
consent.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
consent.summaryBody: By creating an account and selecting "I agree" during sign up, you consent to receive text messages (SMS/MMS), emails, and mobile app notifications about job opportunities, scheduling, onboarding, payroll, and related employment communications. Message & data rates may apply. Reply STOP to unsubscribe from SMS. You can manage push notifications in your device settings.
consent.s1P1: This Consent authorizes us to send you communications via SMS/MMS text messages, email, and mobile app push notifications relating to your application, job opportunities, onboarding, scheduling, timekeeping, payroll, benefits, HR updates, security alerts (including multi-factor codes), and other communications relevant to your engagement with us.
consent.s1P2: Consent to receive these messages is not a condition of applying for or obtaining employment. Where required, we may obtain separate consent for any marketing communications unrelated to your employment or job search.
consent.s2Intro: You may receive, including but not limited to:
consent.s2L1: Job openings, shift offers, assignment confirmations, and schedule changes
consent.s2L2: Onboarding tasks, document reminders, I-9/E-Verify and compliance notices
consent.s2L3: Timecard reminders, payroll notices, and benefits updates
consent.s2L4: Account security alerts, verification codes, and app/service updates
consent.s2L5: Operational announcements required for workplace safety or policy changes
consent.s2P2: We will not send unrelated promotional/marketing messages without a separate, explicit opt-in.
consent.s3P1: Message frequency varies based on your activity, location, and assignments, and may include multiple messages per week during active periods (e.g., onboarding or scheduled shifts).
consent.s4P1: Message and data rates may apply according to your mobile plan and carrier. Carriers are not liable for delayed or undelivered messages. Availability may vary by carrier and device.
consent.s5L1: SMS: You can opt out at any time by replying STOP to any text message from us. To get help, reply HELP.
consent.s5L2: Push Notifications: Manage or disable notifications in your device settings or in the app notification preferences.
consent.s5L3: Email: You may adjust email preferences using links in the footer where available. We may still send transactional or legally required emails.
consent.s5P2: Opting out of SMS or push notifications will not stop communications we are legally permitted or required to send by email or within your account.
consent.s6P1: For assistance with messaging, contact us at
consent.s7P1: By creating an account and selecting "I agree" on the sign-up screen, you confirm that (i) you are the owner or authorized user of the phone number and email you provide; (ii) you authorize us to contact you as described in this Consent; and (iii) you understand you may revoke consent at any time using the methods above.
consent.s7P2: If your phone number or email changes, you agree to update your account information promptly to help ensure accurate delivery of communications.
consent.s8P1: We handle your personal information in accordance with our
consent.s9P1: We may update this Consent from time to time. The "Last Updated" date above will reflect the latest version. Material changes will be posted in the app or website. Continued use of our services after an update constitutes acknowledgment of the updated Consent.
consent.s10P1: We maintain a record of your consent (including date/time, device, IP, and user account) for compliance purposes. You may request a copy of your consent record by contacting
consent.s11P1: This Consent is intended to comply with applicable laws and carrier policies, including the Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA) and relevant state privacy laws. If any provision is found unenforceable in a particular jurisdiction, it will be enforced to the maximum extent permitted, and the remainder will continue in effect.

smsPrivacy.title: SMS/Text Messaging & Mobile Communications Privacy Notice
smsPrivacy.appliesTo: Applies to: C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One, HRX Companion, and related products ("we," "us," "our").
smsPrivacy.introP1: This SMS/Text Messaging & Mobile Communications Privacy Notice (the "Notice") supplements the Privacy Policy of C1 Staffing, LLC and its affiliates, including HRX One and HRX Companion and explains how we collect and use information in connection with SMS/text messaging, mobile alerts, and mobile app notifications (collectively, "Mobile Communications").
smsPrivacy.introP2: This Notice applies to job applicants, employees, contractors, and platform users who enroll in or otherwise receive Mobile Communications from us.
smsPrivacy.s1Title: 1. Information We Collect for Mobile Communications
smsPrivacy.s1Intro: When you provide your mobile number or enable mobile notifications, we may collect and store:
smsPrivacy.s1L2: The date, time, and content of messages sent or received
smsPrivacy.s1L4: Your device type and carrier information
smsPrivacy.s1L5: Your communication preferences and opt-in/opt-out status
smsPrivacy.s1P2: We do not collect the contents of replies beyond what is necessary for operational purposes (for example, STOP, HELP, or message responses).
smsPrivacy.s2Title: 2. How We Use Mobile Communication Data
smsPrivacy.s2L1: Send job-related, onboarding, scheduling, payroll, and employment notifications
smsPrivacy.s2L2: Provide account security alerts and verification codes
smsPrivacy.s2L4: Maintain compliance records for consent, delivery, and opt-out activity
smsPrivacy.s2L5: Troubleshoot delivery errors and improve our messaging system
smsPrivacy.s2P2: We do not sell or rent your phone number or messaging data.
smsPrivacy.s2P3: We will not send unrelated marketing content unless you separately and explicitly opt-in to receive it.
smsPrivacy.s3P1: Where required by law, we rely on your express consent to send Mobile Communications.
smsPrivacy.s3Intro: Consent is typically obtained when you:
smsPrivacy.s3L1: Check the box agreeing to SMS during account creation, or
smsPrivacy.s3L2: Otherwise provide your mobile number and agree to receive communications
smsPrivacy.s3P2: Consent is not required as a condition of applying for or accepting employment.
smsPrivacy.s3P3: You may withdraw consent at any time by replying STOP.
smsPrivacy.s4Title: 4. How to Opt-Out or Get Help
smsPrivacy.s4L1: To stop receiving SMS messages, reply STOP to any message from us.
smsPrivacy.s4L2: To receive assistance, reply HELP or email
smsPrivacy.s4P2: After opting out, you may still receive legally-required or service-essential messages through other channels such as email or in-app notifications.
smsPrivacy.s4P3: Carriers are not liable for delayed or undelivered messages.
smsPrivacy.s5P1: Message frequency varies and may increase during onboarding, scheduling, or active assignments.
smsPrivacy.s5P2: Message and data rates may apply according to your mobile plan and carrier.
smsPrivacy.s6P1: We store Mobile Communication data securely using industry-standard safeguards.
smsPrivacy.s6P2: Opt-in and opt-out records may be retained for compliance purposes such as proving consent under the Telephone Consumer Protection Act (TCPA) or carrier policies.
smsPrivacy.s6P3: Other message data is retained only as long as reasonably necessary to operate our Services or comply with applicable laws.
smsPrivacy.s7P1: Your personal information is handled in accordance with our full Privacy Policy, including your rights to access, correct, or delete information where applicable.
smsPrivacy.s7P2: For details, please review our full Privacy Policy at:
smsPrivacy.s8P1: We may update this Notice from time to time. The "Last Updated" date indicates the most recent revision. Material changes will be posted in our app or website.
smsPrivacy.s8P2: Continued use of our Services after an update constitutes acknowledgment of the revised Notice.
smsPrivacy.s9P1: If you have questions or concerns regarding Mobile Communications or privacy, contact us at:
